crawled_name:
Last updated: Wed Apr 29 2026

OVERVIEW

Buckeye AZ PD
acceptable_use_policy: Data is used for law enforcement purposes only. Data is owned by Buckeye AZ PD and is never sold to 3rd parties.
prohibited_uses: Traffic enforcement, harassment or intimidation, usage based solely on a protected class (i.e. race, sex, religion), Personal use.
access_policy: All system access requires training and a valid reason pursuant to Department Policy.
hotlist_policy:
Hotlist hits are required to be verified prior to action.

NCIC, NCMEC Amber Alert
overview:
Last updated: Wed Apr 29 2026

OVERVIEW

Buckeye AZ PD uses Flock Safety technology to capture objective evidence without compromising on individual privacy. Buckeye AZ PD utilizes retroactive search to solve crimes after they've occurred. Additionally, Buckeye AZ PD utilizes real time alerting of hotlist vehicles to capture wanted criminals. In an effort to ensure proper usage and guardrails are in place, they have made the below policies and usage statistics available to the public.

POLICIES
